recipe.title: Chicken pot pie
recipe.description: A chicken pot pie with puff pastry. This easy chicken pot pie recipe from Jamie's Quick And Easy Food is ready in under half an hour, and so delicious.

steps.descr: Place a 30cm non-stick ovenproof frying pan on a high...
steps.instructions: Place a 30cm non-stick ovenproof frying pan on a high heat, with a smaller non-stick pan on a medium heat alongside. Pour 1 tablespoon of olive oil into the larger pan.

on_enter.say: Place a 30cm non-stick ovenproof frying pan on a high heat, with a smaller non-stick pan on a medium heat alongside. Pour 1 tablespoon of olive oil into the larger pan.

steps.descr: Peel and roughly chop the onions, adding them to the...
steps.instructions: Peel and roughly chop the onions, adding them to the larger pan as you go.

on_enter.say: Peel and roughly chop the onions, adding them to the larger pan as you go.

steps.descr: Roughly chop two-thirds of the thighs, finely chop the...
steps.instructions: Roughly chop two-thirds of the thighs, finely chop the rest, and add to the onion pan. Cook for 6 minutes, or until golden, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Roughly chop two-thirds of the thighs, finely chop the rest, and add to the onion pan. Cook for 6 minutes, or until golden, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, place the mushrooms in the dry pan, tearing...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, place the mushrooms in the dry pan, tearing up any larger ones. Let them toast and get nutty for 4 minutes, then tip into the chicken pan and strip in half the thyme leaves.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, place the mushrooms in the dry pan, tearing up any larger ones. Let them toast and get nutty for 4 minutes, then tip into the chicken pan and strip in half the thyme leaves.

steps.descr: Remove the pan from the heat, add a pinch of sea salt...
steps.instructions: Remove the pan from the heat, add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then stir in 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar and 150ml of water.

on_enter.say: Remove the pan from the heat, add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper, then stir in 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar and 150ml of water.

steps.descr: Working quickly, roll out the pastry so it’s 2cm bigger...
steps.instructions: Working quickly, roll out the pastry so it’s 2cm bigger than the pan, then place it over the filling, using a wooden spoon to push it into the edges.

on_enter.say: Working quickly, roll out the pastry so it’s 2cm bigger than the pan, then place it over the filling, using a wooden spoon to push it into the edges.

steps.descr: Very lightly criss-cross the pastry, then brush with 1...
steps.instructions: Very lightly criss-cross the pastry, then brush with 1 teaspoon of olive oil. Poke the remaining thyme sprigs into the middle of the pie.

on_enter.say: Very lightly criss-cross the pastry, then brush with 1 teaspoon of olive oil. Poke the remaining thyme sprigs into the middle of the pie.

steps.descr: Bake at the bottom of the oven for 15 minutes, or until...
steps.instructions: Bake at the bottom of the oven for 15 minutes, or until golden and puffed up. Easy!

on_enter.say: Bake at the bottom of the oven for 15 minutes, or until golden and puffed up. Easy!
